steps.title: Use the broad pattern
steps.content: The student wants a generalization about circumnavigations. The notes provide both a general pattern, that most include stops on land, and exceptions, that Moreau and Spencer completed nonstop circumnavigations.

steps.title: Combine rule and exception
steps.content: B and D list details about individual sailors instead of making a generalization. C only defines circumnavigation. The correct sentence states the broad pattern and acknowledges that some trips are nonstop. The answer is A.
